notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson hit by pitch. Hunter Goodman scores. Willi Castro to 3rd. Ezequiel Tovar to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros homers (3) on a fly ball to right center field.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Freeman doubles (4) on a fly ball to left fielder Casey Schmitt.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Karros pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Karros flies out to center fielder Drew Gilbert.

notableEvents.label: Drew Gilbert GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drew Gilbert grounds into a double play, third baseman Willi Castro to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Eric Haase out at 2nd. Drew Gilbert out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Matt Chapman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman grounds into a double play, second baseman Edouard Julien to shortstop Ezequiel Tovar to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Jung Hoo Lee out at 2nd. Matt Chapman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
